examples: Red bayberry is a special product.
Red bayberry is my hometown's special product.
I could not help recalling the first time I drank bayberry wine.
"We had a good dune with lots of pine trees and bayberry bushes anchoring it in place, " Patricia Newman said.
Approaches run the gamut from Chase's "Bayberry Bush" (1895), a view of three young girls amid the dunes, to contemporary artist April Gornik's water view "Light Before Heat" (1984).
